title: Fix sidebar red dot for failed sessions

log.context: Fix sidebar red dot for failed sessions

Done. Commit hash: `855118c`

The edit replaces the unconditional class assignment on line 1824 with a guard that only applies `deliberating` or `done` as a class name — any other status (including `failed`, `terminated`, etc.) results in just `status-dot` with no modifier, leaving the dot unstyled and invisible.
